examples.title: Bias Mitigation Algorithm
examples.description: Ensures fair outcomes in credit scoring systems
examples.code:
PROCEDURE EnsureFairCreditScoring
  INPUT: ApplicantData
  APPLY DemographicParityCheck
  IF bias_detected:
    ACTIVATE ReweightingModule
  OUTPUT: AdjustedScore
END
examples.explanation: Checks for demographic parity and reweights features if bias exceeds threshold
